question: Generate a budget justification narrative for an NSF proposal with the following line items: (1) Senior Personnel - PI, 1 month summer salary at $12,000; (2) Graduate Students - 2 PhD students, 12 months each at $30,000/year; (3) Materials and Supplies - $15,000 for computational resources and lab supplies; (4) Travel - $8,000 for 2 conference trips (domestic). For each category, write 2-3 sentences justifying the expense and explaining the calculation basis.

output_format.budget_justification: [Complete narrative with sections for each budget category, each with 2-3 sentences explaining necessity and calculation]
